=== Bob Dylan - Chapel Hill September 15th 1988_Info.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN - Chapel Hill, North Carolina September 15th 1988 (Transfer from 2nd Generation Tape, JTT)

Bob Dylan
Dean E.Smith Students Activities Center
University Of North Carolina
Chapel Hill, North Carolina, USA
September 15th 1988

Very Good/Excellent Stereo Recording

SOURCE: Master Cassette > GS (First Copy) > TDK AD90 (Dolby B) > Akai GX-95MK 11 (Dolby B) >
Soundforge PRO 10 > FLAC Level 6 Align on Sector Boundaries

Transfer from Tape by JTT, April 2010

01. "Stage Announcement"
02. Subterranean Homesick Blues
03. Just Like A Woman
04. Ballad Of A Thin Man
05. I'll Be Your Baby Tonight
06. Masters Of War
07. Highway 61 Revisited
08. The Lonesome Death Of Hattie Carroll
09. Girl From The North Country
10. Don't Think Twice, It's All Right
11. Silvio
12. In The Garden
13. Like A Rolling Stone
14. It Ain't Me, Babe
15. Barbara Allen
16. I Shall Be Released
17. Maggie's Farm
